purpose: Project overview dashboard that gives members a single-screen view of progress, activity, workload, and composition of a space.

space_header.icon: space icon (e.g. a stylized square thumbnail)
actions_right_of_title: Link contributing teams (opens picker to associate Atlassian teams with the space)

navigation.tab_overflow_behavior: When the window is narrow, extra tabs collapse into a '3 more tabs' (or similar) overflow button that opens a menu listing the hidden tabs.

toolbar.position: top of the dashboard, below the tabs

controls.label: Filter
controls.behavior: Active filters render to the right of this button as chips/pills. Clicking opens the filter builder inline with the toolbar.

options.name: Assignee
options.description: Filter by one or more assignees (including Unassigned and Current user).

options.name: Created
options.description: Filter by when work was created (date range / relative).

options.name: Parent
options.description: Filter by parent work item (e.g. epic).

options.name: Priority
options.description: Filter by Highest / High / Medium / Low / Lowest.

options.name: Status
options.description: Filter by workflow status (To Do, In Progress, Done, ...).

options.name: Updated
options.description: Filter by last updated date range.

options.name: Work type
options.description: Filter by Task / Workstream / Sub-task / Epic / ...

layout.grid: 1-column row of 4 stat tiles, then a 2-column grid of widgets
layout.responsive: Widgets reflow to a single column on narrow viewports.

widgets.name: Stat tiles
widgets.description: Row of four clickable summary tiles, each drilling into a pre-built filtered List view.

tiles.subtitle: in the last 7 days
tiles.link_query_jql: project = "{key}" AND statusCategory = Done AND statusCategoryChangedDate >= -1w
tiles.click_behavior: If count > 0 and items match, opens filtered List view; otherwise still opens the List with the JQL applied (empty state).

tiles.subtitle: in the last 7 days
tiles.special_case: If there is exactly one matching item, the tile links directly to /browse/{key}-{n} instead of the List.

tiles.subtitle: in the next 7 days
tiles.link_query_jql: project = "{key}" AND due <= 1w AND statusCategory != Done

widgets.empty_behavior: Counts render as 0 when nothing matches; tiles remain clickable and open the List in its empty state.

widgets.name: Status overview
widgets.subtitle: Get a snapshot of the status of your work items.

chart.segments: Colored arcs per workflow status (To Do, In Progress, Done, plus any custom statuses)

legend.item_behavior: Each legend entry is a link to List view filtered by that status
legend.example: "To Do : 1" links to List with JQL: project = "{key}" AND status = 'To Do'

interactions: Hover a segment/legend entry to highlight it
Click a segment or legend entry to open List filtered by that status

widgets.empty_state: If there are no work items, the chart collapses and a message prompts creating the first work item.

widgets.name: Recent activity
widgets.subtitle: Stay up to date with what's happening across the space.

controls_right_of_title.label: Expand
controls_right_of_title.behavior: Opens a modal dialog titled 'Recent activity' containing the same subtitle and a larger scrollable list of events, with a close (x) button and Esc-to-dismiss support.

event_item.actor_link: User display name (links to their profile)
event_item.target_link: Work item pill (e.g. 'AUT-1: This is a test TO DO') or raw URL when the work item is not fully resolved in-feed
event_item.status_badge_inline: Small status lozenge next to the work item (e.g. TO DO, IN PROGRESS, DONE)

modal.title: Recent activity
modal.subtitle: Stay up to date with what's happening across the space.

widgets.name: Priority breakdown
widgets.subtitle: Get a holistic view of how work is being prioritized.

inline_action.label: How to manage priorities for spaces

interactions: Each bar / x-axis label is a link to List view filtered by that priority, scoped to open items
Example JQL (Medium): project = "{key}" AND priority = 'Medium' AND statusCategory != Done

widgets.scope_note: Only counts work items whose statusCategory is not Done.

widgets.name: Types of work
widgets.subtitle: Get a breakdown of work items by their types.

row.type_cell: Work type icon + name (link to List filtered by that work type, e.g. JQL: project = "{key}" AND issuetype = 'Task')
row.distribution_cell: Horizontal bar with filled portion proportional to share of all items; percentage label rendered inside the bar (e.g. '100%'). Empty bar for 0%.

widgets.name: Team workload
widgets.subtitle: Monitor the capacity of your team.

inline_action.label: Reassign work items to get the right balance

row.assignee_cell: Avatar + name (link). 'Unassigned' bucket uses a placeholder avatar and is not a user profile link but filters the List by assignee = EMPTY.
row.work_distribution_cell: Horizontal bar proportional to share of all open items assigned to that person, with percentage inside the bar.

widgets.name: Related spaces
widgets.subtitle: Use spaces to manage all your work in one place and stay aligned with stakeholders.

list_items: Space name (link to that space's Summary)

content_when_empty.illustration: Blue globe/planet with a yellow-starred flag and orbiting nodes (empty-state art)

page_footer.feedback_prompt: Was the information shown on this page useful?

action.label: Give us feedback
action.behavior: Opens an in-product feedback dialog scoped to the Summary dashboard.

floating_controls.label: Open Rovo Chat
floating_controls.behavior: Opens Atlassian Rovo AI chat panel anchored to the viewport.

aria_notes: Space nav uses role=navigation name='Space navigation'
Each widget heading is a <h2>; sub-labels in tables are <h6>; day groups in Recent activity are <h3>; stat tile numbers are <h4>
keyboard_and_accessibility.focus_behavior: Expand button retains focus state (active, focused) after activation; Escape closes popovers/modals.

data_refresh.trigger: On navigation to the page and on explicit user actions (e.g. applying a filter). Widgets can re-query independently.
data_refresh.stale_handling: Widgets briefly show skeleton loaders (observed as 'Loading...' listbox/heading states) while data streams in.

permissions_and_visibility.visibility: All space members can view the Summary dashboard.
permissions_and_visibility.edit_space_settings: Administrative actions (Automation, Link contributing teams, Share) require appropriate space permissions; the buttons appear but may open permission-gated dialogs.

linked_destinations_summary.updated_tile: /list?jql=project='{key}' AND updated>=-1w (or direct /browse/{key}-{n} when exactly one result)
linked_destinations_summary.team_workload_row: /list?jql=project='{key}' AND assignee={accountId} (or assignee is EMPTY for Unassigned)

capture_notes.capture_method: cursor-ide-browser MCP (DOM snapshots + full-page screenshots + click-through probing of stat tiles and chart segments)
